nodes.label: Audio File
nodes.description: Stereo audio file source (AudioFile slot). SampleMap and SFZ sources are disabled.

nodes.label: Read Position
nodes.description: Reads samples from the audio file at the current playback position with loop wrapping.

nodes.label: Time Stretcher
nodes.description: Signalsmith Stretch phase-vocoder algorithm. Stretches/compresses time independently of pitch. Bypassed when Enable=0.

nodes.label: Gate
nodes.description: Start/stop playback. Transition to On seeks to position 0.

nodes.label: TimeRatio
nodes.description: Playback speed multiplier (0.5-2.0). Overridden by ClockSync.

nodes.label: Pitch
nodes.description: Pitch shift in semitones (-12 to +12), independent of time.

nodes.label: Enable
nodes.description: Toggles timestretching on/off. Off = direct playback.

nodes.label: ClockSync
nodes.description: Syncs speed and position to DAW tempo/transport.
